headline: Is Corteva (CTVA) Still Reasonable After A 40% One-Year Share Price Rally?
summary: Wondering if Corteva at around US$82.95 is offering good value or asking too much for its potential is exactly the question this article will help you unpack. The stock has returned 22.4% year to date and 40.3% over the last year, with a recent 4.7% move over the past 30 days and a 2.8% pullback across the last week that may have caught your eye. Recent coverage has focused on Corteva as a key player in agricultural inputs, with attention on how its portfolio positions it within the broader...
